title: Ancient city reveals traces of 17 centuries of uninterrupted life
description: Ongoing excavations in southwestern Türkiye uncover long-term settlement continuity and a sophisticated civic system in one of Pisidia’s most strategic ancient cities.

title: Huge 'bathtub ring' may show contours of ancient ocean on Mars
description: A new study builds on earlier evidence of a bygone Martian ocean including studies identifying features resembling an ancient shoreline.

title: Huge 'bathtub ring' may show contours of ancient ocean on Mars - The Japan Times
description: Huge 'bathtub ring' may show contours of ancient ocean on Mars The Japan Times View Full coverage on Google News

title: 'Groundbreaking' archaeology discovery could prove Greek myth is true
description: Researchers believe they have uncovered an ancient Greek sanctuary devoted to legendary Trojan War hero Odysseus on the island of Ithaca, with a tile bearing his name and religious artefacts dating back to the Mycenaean period

title: Ancient Anglo‐Saxon ring found in Essex field to go on display after major purchase
description: Manager of the Epping Forest District Museum Ian Channell says a newly acquired Anglo‐Saxon gold ring will go on display after being secured for the Museum through major grant funding.
